chief_complaint: Two female patients, referred for ictal event monitoring, presented with seizure activity.
history: Both patients had a history of drug-resistant epilepsy, with a third of people with epilepsy not achieving seizure control despite antiseizure medications. They were referred for ictal single-photon emission computed tomography (SPECT) imaging in a low-resource African setting.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings were not provided.
labs: Ictal EEG, ictal SPECT, and magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) co-registration were performed. Ictal SPECT was acquired during a triggered seizure on a Mediso AnyScan S Dual-head SPECT scanner using standard clinical brain SPECT protocols.
